sections.title: Punishment for Murder
sections.description: Prescribes punishment for committing murder, which is death or imprisonment for life and fine.

sections.title: Attempt to Murder
sections.description: Defines the offense and punishment for attempting to commit murder.

sections.title: Theft
sections.description: Defines theft (dishonest moving of movable property out of possession without consent) and its punishment.

sections.title: Robbery
sections.description: Defines robbery, which includes theft or extortion accompanied by causing hurt, fear, or death.

sections.title: Dacoity
sections.description: Defines dacoity, which is robbery committed by five or more persons conjointly.

sections.title: Lurking House-trespass or House-breaking
sections.description: Defines lurking house-trespass and house-breaking by night.

sections.title: Kidnapping
sections.description: Defines kidnapping from India or from lawful guardianship.

sections.title: Assault or Criminal Force
sections.description: Punishment for assault or use of criminal force otherwise than on grave provocation.

sections.title: Cruelty by Husband or Relatives
sections.description: Defines cruelty toward a woman by her husband or his relatives.

sections.title: Dowry Death
sections.description: Defines dowry death, occurring within 7 years of marriage due to harassment for dowry.

sections.title: Punishment for Rape
sections.description: Defines rape and details mandatory minimum punishments under BNS.

sections.title: Sexual Harassment
sections.description: Defines and punishes sexual harassment including physical contact, demands, or showing pornography.

sections.title: Cheating by Personation using Computer Resource
sections.description: Cheating by pretending to be someone else using digital resources.

sections.title: Cheating
sections.description: Defines cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property.

sections.title: Forgery
sections.description: Defines making a false document with intent to cause damage or fraud.

sections.title: Extortion
sections.description: Defines extortion, inducing a person to deliver property under fear of injury.

sections.title: Criminal Breach of Trust
sections.description: Punishment for dishonest misappropriation of property entrusted to a person.

sections.title: Manufacture, Possession or Sale of Drugs
sections.description: Punishment for contravention in relation to psychotropic substances.

sections.title: Possession of unlicensed arms
sections.description: Punishment for acquisition, possession, manufacture, or sale of prohibited arms.

sections.title: Rash Driving
sections.description: Driving or riding on a public way in a rash or negligent manner endangering human life.

sections.title: Information in cognizable cases
sections.description: General reporting and entry of a missing person report.

sections.title: Causing Death by Negligence
sections.description: Causing death of any person by doing any rash or negligent act not amounting to culpable homicide.

sections.title: Cheating and Dishonestly Inducing Delivery of Property
sections.description: Deceiving any person and inducing them to deliver property.

sections.title: Cheating
sections.description: Dishonest inducement in financial dealings.

sections.title: Forgery
sections.description: Creating forged accounts or securities.

sections.title: Preliminary Assessment in Heinous Offences
sections.description: Assessment of child's mental and physical capacity to commit offense.

sections.title: Criminal Trespass
sections.description: Entering into or upon property in possession of another with intent to commit an offense.

sections.title: Rioting
sections.description: Guilty of rioting when force or violence is used by an unlawful assembly.

sections.title: Public Nuisance
sections.description: Doing any act that causes common injury, danger, or annoyance to the public.
